name: ACTELIS NETWORKS INC
summary: Actelis Networks, Inc. is a provider of cyber-hardened, rapid-deployment networking solutions for wide-area IoT, federal, military, state and local government, and intelligent traffic systems (ITS) markets. The company offers hybrid fiber-copper aggregation switches, high-density Ethernet devices, advanced network management software, and AI-based cyber monitoring via its MetaShield SaaS platform. Its patented technology upgrades existing copper and coaxial lines to fiber-grade performance, enabling cost-effective, secure, rapid network deployment without full fiber replacement.

products.name: Hybrid Fiber-Copper Aggregation Switches
products.description: Cyber-hardened switches combining fiber and existing copper/coax infrastructure for wide-area IoT networks.

products.name: High Density Ethernet Devices
products.description: Ethernet devices enabling high-speed connectivity over existing copper and coaxial lines.

products.name: Advanced Network Management Software
products.description: Secure, encrypted software for managing Actelis networking deployments.

products.name: MetaShield AI-Powered SaaS
products.description: AI-based cyber monitoring and protection platform for IoT edge devices, launched December 2024 under Cyber Aware Networking initiative.

products.name: Triple-Shield Data Protection
products.description: Cyber security feature providing coding, scrambling, and encryption of network traffic.

products.name: Multi-Dwelling Unit (MDU) Solutions
products.description: Inside and outside building connectivity solutions to modernize and protect MDU infrastructure.
